title: 🔴 The AI Coding Marketplace is Finally LIVE!
summary: Archon Workflow Marketplace has launched for community submissions. The platform uses Archon's own auto-review pipeline to process submissions, demonstrating a self-referential system where the tool reviews content created for itself.
